title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
